ddls:
CREATE TABLE "smile_data" (
  "smile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smile data entry */,
  "frame" INTEGER /* Reference to the frame number */,
  "smile_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the smile (e.g., 0-1) */,
  "smile_type" TEXT /* Type of smile (e.g., Duchenne, non-Duchenne) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blink_data" (
  "blink_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blink data entry */,
  "frame" INTEGER /* Reference to the frame number */,
  "blink_duration" REAL /* Duration of the blink in seconds */,
  "blink_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of blinks per minute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blink_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each smile data entry
Unique identifier for each blink data entry
Duration of the blink in seconds
